title: elatine gussonei
intro: Elatine gussonei, also known as Italian waterwort, is a perennial aquatic plant species belonging to the family Elatinaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elatine gussonei are still being researched, but it may help to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of Elatine gussonei can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more studies are needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
